title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese documents how he used Claude Code to build a $481k/year product with zero prior coding experience in 45 days. The video walks through five steps: starting with the problem, knowing where to engineer vs. leverage existing solutions, learning technical vocabulary, planning before building, and identifying what can break. Specific prompts are provided for using Claude Code to identify critical workflows, generate vocabulary tutorials, validate before deployment, and audit for performance issues.
